ACIP recommendations become official agency guidelines once the recommendation has been adopted by the CDC director. Additional information about ACIP is available at https://www.cdc.gov/acip/index.html .
† Past immunization schedules are available at https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/imz-schedules/resources.html .
§ CDC encourages organizations to use syndication as a more reliable method for displaying the most current and accurate immunization schedules on an organization’s website rather than copying these schedules to their websites. Use of content syndication requires a one-time step that ensures an organization’s website displays current schedules as soon as they are published or revised; instructions for syndication code are available on CDC’s website ( https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/imz-schedules/syndicate-resources.html ). CDC also offers technical assistance for implementing this form of content syndication (requests can be emailed to ncirdwebteam@cdc.gov ).
